certificate.description: Specifies the SSL certificate in PEM format to be used for the regional SSL certificate resource; required and must be valid.

description.description: Detailed description of the regional SSL certificate, such as its purpose or usage.

name.description: The name of the regional SSL certificate, must be unique within the region.

name_prefix.description: Defines the prefix for the SSL certificate name, which must be unique within the region and comply with Google Cloud naming conventions.

private_key.description: PEM-encoded private key required for the SSL certificate; must match the associated certificate.

timeouts.description: Defines the allowed duration for operations related to the regional SSL certificate, such as creation or deletion.
